In the most auspicious time that is called as Krita Yuga
we all have assembled here to understand
the ways and methods of establishing our principle amongst Ruta-yoga.
Ruta-Yoga means,
a time when you have to do something,
ruta – when it was done
So, you are the channels of that will.
Doing work God
You're the channel of God Almighty and His power
On one side, you have to carry the dignity
–the glory and assumption that your are a guru.
D'une part, vous devez assumer la dignité et la compréhension que vous êtes un maître.
On the other side you have to be completely surrendered
through your God Almighty
Et d'autre part, vous devez complètement vous abandonner à votre Dieu
All your dignity, your authority comes from Him.
And the third thing is that
he has created this universe and you
in a mood of play
You have to see His play
So, a kind of mood that is cheerfulness should be really bubbling through you.
So far, the idea of guru was that such a person never laughs and never smiles – always
in temper.
That's all right for gurus who did not have to have any contact with public but
hang themselves with a string somewhere in the Himalayas.
But here we are facing
The entire universe
which has to receive
the bubbling streams of your love.
But that does not mean
you have to be frivolous, because it cannot be.
The Divine play is non-frivolous
It is joyful, and the joy does not have that duality.
So to get into the establishment of your guru principle
first we should know how it's destroyed
As it is, anything that is not looked after or maintained gets destroyed.
If you do no pay attention say to these beautiful plants here they will be destroyed
Even matter which is not attended to gets disturbed.
So first of all we have know that you must be attentive and alert,
that if we do not maintain ourselves,
will be destroyed.
because maintenance is not for maintenancing.
It's to stop the destruction of your guru principle,
when we are negligent or lazy about it
we are responsible for destroying our guru principle.
So the attention that you have
is to be given
through the maintenance of this guru principle
The gurus have the capacity to maintain themselves and maintain others.
In their beginning, when the gurus tried
to establish this maintenance principle,
they put very-very strong rules and regulations.
If you read Bible in the levy chapter
you will find all the Shariahs that are described,
which they're following now in Riyadh
or in Arabic countries.
To maintain
that principle within yourself,
it's written in such strong languages like
Such a person who does not do this should be killed to death.
such a person does anything wrong of this kind,
should be killed by stoning.
That was at the very beginning
so those people now
had that stage evolution
required
and kind of fear
But it was meant for people to give a great idea of the importance of the Prince's life.
the principle of guru within themselves.
At that stage they used
frightening methods, I should say
horribly dangerous time
At that time, people obeyed also.
Then another evolutions there is took place
where a stage started
People thought they must become austere
and start maintaining themselves by tremendous austerity
So it was self-projecting
It wasn't projected towards others
but projected towards themselves.
We can say that the first wave started
when the guru,
The Primordial Guru said
That if you don't do this
then You will be killed!
The second stage was where the disciples accepted this within themselves
and started telling themself that if we do not do it,
will kill ourselves.
So, the first step was that the guru said if you don't behave in this way, you will be killed.
The second one is that the disciple had internalized his commandment
and he said I won' t do such or such a thing
according to dharma – then i'll kill myself.
Austerity started on the basis of wisdom
not on obstinacy.
But then it became even fanaticism.
So it went to one extreme.
It started with the idea of maintenance,
is stated in that idea of maintenance
but maintenance itself became impossible
or perhaps they thought
that they are not being able to maintain,
you got confused.
And for them rules and regulations became more important
than maintenance itself."
Thus do find
They destroy themselves
The wisdom
or the essence of Guru Tattva is a balance.
Like when you maintain a plant,
if do not give it water –
It will die!
If You gave too much water –
It'll die !
So wisdom lies in understanding
how much water should be given to the plant
so that it comes up at its best.
Now this wisdom has
been achieved through your vibratory awareness
You are placed under the most fortunate circumstances, that you are realized souls before your guru-tattva is fully established.
You have all the powers that any guru can aspire without having the establishment of Guru Tattva.
Especially you are under the complete blanket
of clouds, your Mother's love.
But in no way
Mother's Love is going to allow
You destroy Your good principle
As I told you, that guru principle is a very sensitive thing and it's destroyed if
You yourself do not try to maintain it.
First of all, the destruction starts from
the very source of our being.
I mean to say that
Our Being is created by five elements
and The Five Elements have a capacity
all the time to get destroyed.
Any one of these elements, if they are not looked after
– then you destroy it!
That is a built-in capacity
for this element or matter as we can say
So maintaining them
is important.
Some people have an idea that once you become a guru
it will not maintain everything,
but it's maintained by itself!
It isn't!
I agree
that the Spirit definitely enhances
The beauty and health of these elements.
But at a human level there is always
A greater force trying to destroy it
So till we have completely become the Spirit,
there is always a chance of this destruction working it out.
One may say why these balance needed?
and this is an important question
which we should be able to answer all the people who ask us.
Without balance, you cannot ascend
If You can not ascend
what's use of our becoming human beings?
For example, everything is God.
But nobody's aware!
At the human level you become aware
means that every thing exists
Everything is there, but it's not aware.
Say that a stone is also gone
and yet it isn't aware
Like say this area is completely dark
and we are blind.
There is nothing to be seen,
or experienced when you're in that condition
Actually one thinks the darkness
it's a truth
That ignorance is the truth
When the sun comes up and a light comes in and your eyes open, you start seeing everything.
You started becoming aware
so at human level
you are aware at the highest point.
Now this awareness has to become
be awareness of The Spirit,
that is happened in you
You have felt The spirit
But the balance is not there as yet.
Your mother has pulled you out and made that,
but still there's imbalance inside
If you go slightly to the left,
You can be destroyed.
And if we go a little bit right,
We'll destroy it all.
So try both these things
as I've told you about methods
which i will explain
First of All
You have to be austere with yourself
Just separate yourself from your self.
Separate youself as a spirit and look at your ego
And super-ego
Now, You start watching the ego
Do not maintain it.
They are the destroying forces
Now when you see
The play as a witness
Of these destroying forces
You will know how to also
Maintain yourself better
To separate yourself is easier when you take to austerity.

All kinds of hands up,

if you're Indians

If You said

Go from one extreme to another extreme

The One Who Is Great Master

To reality

it understood as man who is cunning
you know how to deviate from right path and all that

The source of the common-sense, it's spirit

it creates something out of the blue

that's how the most practical thing is.

it's one wave which falls
